queries: Milk and Honey spa alternatives west Houston
action.query: Milk and Honey spa alternatives west Houston

annotations.title: The Spa at The Post Oak Hotel

content.text:
If you're seeking spa alternatives to Milk + Honey in West Houston, here are several options to consider:

**[Luxe Wellness Spa](http://luxewspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Spa · 5.0 (39 reviews)**  
_1250 W Sam Houston Pkwy S, Houston, TX 77042_  
Situated in the Westchase district, Luxe Wellness Spa provides various spa treatments in a serene environment, focusing on personalized wellness experiences.

**[The Spa at The Post Oak Hotel](https://www.thepostoakhotel.com/wellness/spa/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Spa · 4.1 (162 reviews)**  
_1600 W Loop S 5th Floor, Houston, TX 77027_  
As Texas's only Forbes Five-Star spa, this 20,000-square-foot facility offers luxurious treatments inspired by international wellness traditions.

**[Urban Day Spa](https://urbandayspa.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Day spa · 4.6 (390 reviews)**  
_7014 Hwy 6 N Ste D, Houston, TX 77095_  
Located in the Copperfield area, Urban Day Spa offers a range of services including Swedish, deep tissue, sports, pre-natal, and hot stone massages, along with couples massages and full spa packages.

**[Sanctuary Spa](http://www.besanctuary.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Day spa · 4.8 (284 reviews)**  
_1701 S Shepherd Dr suite c, Houston, TX 77019_  
Established in 1984, Sanctuary Spa offers holistic and aromatic spa services, including facials, massages, and body treatments, in a tranquil environment.

Each of these spas offers a unique experience, so consider your specific preferences and desired treatments when making a selection.
